title: The Day--The Way
content:
Not for one single day
    Can I discern my way,
                But this I surely know,--
    Who gives the day,
    Will show the way,
                So I securely go.
meaning:
"The Day--The Way" is a quintessential example of William Arthur Dunkerley (John Oxenham)'s signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
